# Moving24

> Kolimisteenus / Переезды / Moving and transport service in Tallinn and across Estonia. Apartment, home, office and business moves, heavy-item transport (pianos, safes), packing and waste removal. Available 24/7.

## Pages
- [Avaleht - Eesti (ET)](https://dennymansa.github.io/moving24-landing/)
- [Главная - Русский (RU)](https://dennymansa.github.io/moving24-landing/ru/)
- [Home - English (EN)](https://dennymansa.github.io/moving24-landing/en/)

## Contact
- Phone: +372 5687 0101
- Email: info@moving24.ee
- Address: Kentmanni 28, 10116 Tallinn, Estonia
- Hours: 24/7
